_meta.description: Machine-readable mirror of the Velora API troubleshooting tables. Each row maps a documented symptom on a specific endpoint to its root cause, fix, and the human-readable docs anchor.
_meta.note: Documented examples — not an exhaustive enumeration of every possible error string. Updated from support tickets at each release.

errors.cause: Native ETH sent as 0x0 or lowercase 0xeee...e.
errors.fix: Use the mixed-case placeholder 0xEeeeeEeeeEeEeeEeEeEeeEEEeeeeEeeeeeeeEEeE.

errors.cause: network not in the supported-chain list for the current API host.
errors.fix: Hit GET /chains to confirm the live list; see /resources/chains-and-contracts.

errors.cause: Price impact exceeds the configured ceiling for this route.
errors.fix: Reduce trade size, split into hops, or pass an explicit higher maxImpact if your product accepts the risk.

errors.cause: More than ~30s elapsed between quote and tx-build; route became invalid.
errors.fix: Re-quote and pass the fresh priceRoute verbatim; never cache across user gestures.

errors.cause: Free-tier rate limit hit, or Pro plan quota exceeded.
errors.fix: Upgrade to a Pro API account (see /overview/pro-api-accounts) to lift limits, or back off and retry.

errors.cause: priceRoute modified between quote and tx-build, or older than ~30s.
errors.fix: Pass the priceRoute block from GET /prices verbatim; re-quote if more than ~30s elapsed.

errors.cause: Slippage tolerance too tight for current market depth.
errors.fix: Increase slippage (in bps) on the rebuild, or surface a higher tolerance to the user before retrying.

errors.cause: ERC-20 allowance to the v6.2 router insufficient, or allowance pointed at the legacy v5 router.
errors.fix: Approve the Augustus v6.2 router address — see /resources/chains-and-contracts; if migrating off v5, see /resources/migrations/augustus-v5-to-v6-2.

errors.cause: RPC gas estimation can't simulate the exact block conditions.
errors.fix: Use the gas field returned in the response as a baseline + 15-25% headroom.

errors.match: Calldata builds for the wrong chain
errors.cause: network path parameter mismatched against priceRoute.network.
errors.fix: Always derive :network from priceRoute.network, not from a client-side variable.

errors.cause: Your partner tier doesn't permit the requested fee/surplus configuration.
errors.fix: Drop the disallowed param, or contact partnerships to upgrade the tier.

errors.cause: Native ETH sent as 0x0 or lowercase 0xeee...e.
errors.fix: Use the mixed-case placeholder 0xEeeeeEeeeEeEeeEeEeEeeEEEeeeeEeeeeeeeEEeE.

errors.match: Response has market instead of delta
errors.cause: mode=ALL and Market won the routing decision.
errors.fix: Force mode=DELTA if Delta is required, or branch on response.delta vs response.market. See /integrate/trading-modes.

errors.cause: slippage omitted on a Delta quote.
errors.fix: Pass slippage in basis points (e.g. 100 = 1%).

errors.cause: chainId is supported by Market but Delta hasn't shipped on that chain yet.
errors.fix: Check GET /chains for the Delta-enabled subset; see /resources/chains-and-contracts.

errors.cause: The pair / size combination doesn't have partial-fill liquidity from solvers.
errors.fix: Reduce size, or design the UX around all-or-nothing fills for this pair.

errors.cause: delta block mutated between calls (recomputed amounts, decoded/re-encoded).
errors.fix: Pass the delta object verbatim as price; hmac unchanged from the quote response.

errors.cause: The delta block from GET /v2/quote was mutated, re-encoded, or re-stringified before submit.
errors.fix: Pass the delta object verbatim as price. Don't run it through JSON normalizers, sorters, or schema validators.

errors.cause: The hmac from the quote response was dropped, modified, or paired with a different delta.
errors.fix: Always send the hmac paired with the exact delta returned from the same quote response.

errors.cause: Wallet signed against a different chain id, verifying contract, or version.
errors.fix: Verify domain.chainId, domain.verifyingContract, and domain.name/version match what POST /v2/delta/orders/build returned.

errors.cause: Token approval granted to the Augustus router instead of the Delta contract.
errors.fix: Approve the Delta contract as spender — it's the spender on Delta flows, not Augustus. See /resources/chains-and-contracts.

errors.match: Build succeeds but downstream /v2/delta/orders returns expired
errors.cause: Long delay between build and signature (user wandered off, app backgrounded).
errors.fix: Re-quote and rebuild when the user returns; treat order-server expiry as a hard ceiling, surface a countdown in your UI.

errors.cause: The token requires Permit or Permit2 and the build request didn't include the payload.
errors.fix: Detect Permit/Permit2 capability up front and include the payload in the build request.

errors.cause: Signed payload doesn't match the order field byte-for-byte.
errors.fix: Sign the exact order returned by POST /v2/delta/orders/build. Don't re-sort, re-stringify, or re-encode.

errors.cause: More than ~30s elapsed between build and submit.
errors.fix: Submit the signed order within the validity window; if the user pauses, re-quote and rebuild.

errors.cause: Solver auction returned no fill (size, pair, or chain conditions).
errors.fix: Poll GET /v2/delta/orders/:id; if still pending past your SLA, cancel and re-quote.

errors.cause: Allowance revoked, balance moved, or token-approval points at the wrong spender.
errors.fix: Confirm allowance to the Delta contract spender persists for the order's full lifecycle. See /resources/chains-and-contracts.

errors.match: partialFill order settles partial then stalls
errors.cause: Solver network couldn't source the remainder at the signed price.
errors.fix: Decide whether to cancel and re-quote the remainder, or wait for the full validity window.

errors.cause: Client treated empty response as success; gateway response was actually a 5xx.
errors.fix: Always check status and presence of id; retry on 5xx with idempotent re-submission of the same signed payload.

errors.cause: Cancellation EIP-712 typed data assembled wrong (wrong chainId or wrong domain).
errors.fix: Sign the relayer's cancel payload; the SDK's signCancelDeltaOrderRequest handles this for you.

errors.cause: One or more orderIds are already post-settlement or terminal: COMPLETED, REFUNDING, REFUNDED, FAILED, EXPIRED, or CANCELLED.
errors.fix: Pre-filter orderIds to PENDING, AWAITING_SIGNATURE, ACTIVE, or SUSPENDED.

errors.match: OK but order doesn't move to CANCELLING
errors.cause: An auction had already started for that order; cancellation queues but won't kill an in-flight fill.
errors.fix: Wait one polling interval; the order moves to CANCELLED once the relayer confirms.

errors.cause: Tried to batch-cancel too many orders in one call.
errors.fix: Chunk into batches of <= 100.
